business_ideas.idea: White label enterprise sales team: recruit salespeople from Cutco, mall kiosks, train for B2B SaaS
Seven-figure millionaire matchmaker on contingency fee (minimum $50M net worth clients, $1M fee)
Structured agendas for events: time-block conversations (dating life, work, philosophy) for better content

predictions.text: Sales teams are in high demand; companies built around quality salespeople will get acquired
Authenticity and being yourself becomes easier and more valuable after achieving business success
